title: GJMSComposition
summary: Specializes ordered compositions to the canonical ambient GJMS family.

mathematicalContent.heading: Mathematical role
mathematicalContent.body: Specializes ordered compositions to the canonical ambient GJMS family.

mathematicalContent.heading: Formal boundary
mathematicalContent.body: This page describes exactly the declarations present in Juhlformula/Juhloperators/GJMSComposition.lean; claims not represented by a declaration are not counted as verified.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Definition: canonical Juhl GJMSFamily. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
Definition: canonical GJMSComposition. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: def canonicalGJMSComposition (H : CalConf.AlgebraicIdentities) {N : Nat} (I : Composition N) : Function Conf → Function Conf

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: canonical GJMSComposition singleton. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem canonicalGJMSComposition_singleton (H : CalConf.AlgebraicIdentities) (N : Nat) (hN : 0 < N) : canonicalGJMSComposition CalConf H (Composition.singleton N hN) = abstractToUnary CalConf (GJMS.canonicalAmbientGJMS CalConf H N)

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: canonical GJMSComposition singleton apply. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem canonicalGJMSComposition_singleton_apply (H : CalConf.AlgebraicIdentities) (N : Nat) (hN : 0 < N) (f : Function Conf) : canonicalGJMSComposition CalConf H (Composition.singleton N hN) f = (GJMS.canonicalAmbientGJMS CalConf H N).toWeightedTangentialOperator.toOperator f

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: canonical GJMSComposition singleton apply lap Pow. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem canonicalGJMSComposition_singleton_apply_lapPow (H : CalConf.AlgebraicIdentities) (N : Nat) (hN : 0 < N) (f : Function Conf) : canonicalGJMSComposition CalConf H (Composition.singleton N hN) f = CalConf.lapPow N f

limitations: Verified means that Lean checks the propositions encoded in this file and their imported assumptions. It does not assert that the present formal statement exhausts every analytic hypothesis or convention in the cited literature.
